acceptanceCriteria.text: POST /guardians/:id/students links student with relationship type
GET /guardians/:id/students returns children with relationship info
GetGuardianChildrenUseCase created wrapping existing repo method
All endpoints require X-Campus-Id header and ClerkAuthGuard

snapshot.description: Add 3 new endpoints to guardian controller: link student, unlink student, get guardian children. Create GetGuardianChildrenUseCase wrapping existing repo method. Reuse or wrap existing linking use cases. Add appropriate DTOs.
snapshot.title: Guardian-Side Student Linking Endpoints
